===Pokémon Generations===
{{MissingInfo|1|enva}}
[[File:Mars PG.png|thumb|250px|Mars in [[Pokémon Generations]]]]
Mars appeared along with [[Jupiter]] in ''[[PG11|The New World]]'', where she watched [[Cyrus]] as he tried to create a new world using {{p|Dialga}} and {{p|Palkia}}. However, they watched as {{p|Giratina}} interfered with Cyrus' plan by freeing the two Legendaries and dragging him into the [[Distortion World]].
